data.title: GPT-5.5 by OpenAI achieves 91.7% on benchmarks, offering legal AI features. Now accessible for ChatGPT Plus and Pro users.
data.description: The latest version of OpenAI's language model, GPT-5.5, has been released with upgraded legal AI features, achieving an impressive score of 91.7% on benchmark tests. This advanced model is currently accessible to users subscribed to ChatGPT Plus and Pro.

data.title: Trump set to speak at memecoin event this Saturday after White House confirms last-minute addition to schedule.
data.description: President Donald Trump has confirmed his attendance at an event specifically for holders of the TRUMP memecoin, despite earlier White House statements indicating the event was not on his schedule. The news comes as a surprise to many, with a significant number of individuals expected to attend the event that revolves around the memecoin bearing the President's name. Trump's appearance has sparked interest and speculation, with the gathering likely to draw attention from a wide audience.

data.title: DOJ task force seizes $701M in crypto, freezes Telegram channel and shuts down 503 fraudulent crypto websites in scam crackdown.
data.description: In addition to halting cryptocurrency transactions, the enforcement team also confiscated a Telegram channel employed for luring unaware job seekers and shut down a total of 503 fraudulent cryptocurrency investment platforms.

data.title: Western Union Likely To Report Lower Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: The Western Union Company (NYSE: WU) is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on April 24, with analysts predicting a decrease in earnings to 39 cents per share compared to 41 cents per share in the same period last year. The consensus estimate for quarterly revenue is $962.88 million, lower than the $983.6 million reported last year. Milind Pant, a global business leader, was recently appointed to the board of directors on March 13. The company's shares closed at $9.33, declining by 1.8% on Thursday. For more details and analyst ratings, readers can visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page on Benzinga.

data.title: HCA Healthcare Earnings Are Imminent; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
data.description: HCA Healthcare, Inc. is set to announce its first-quarter earnings on Friday, April 24, before the market opens. Analysts are predicting the Nashville-based company will report earnings of $7.15 per share, an increase from $6.45 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be around $19.07 billion, up from $18.32 billion in the previous year. In the fourth quarter of 2025, HCA Healthcare posted mixed financial results. As of Thursday, HCA Healthcare's shares closed at $474.03, marking a 0.6% increase. For more details and up-to-date analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.

data.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Norfolk Southern Expectations Ahead Of Q1 Earnings
data.description: Norfolk Southern Corporation (stock symbol: NSC) is set to reveal its first-quarter earnings on April 24, with analysts predicting earnings of $2.49 per share, a decrease from $2.69 per share last year. Revenue is projected to reach around $3.00 billion, slightly higher than the $2.99 billion reported last year. The company recently declared a quarterly dividend of $1.35 per share. In response to the upcoming earnings, Norfolk Southern's stock price surged by 7.8% to close at $321.44. For more insights, Benzinga Pro offers access to the latest analyst ratings. The full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Admin By Request Joins Three Nordic Security and Technology Events in Early May
data.description: Admin By Request is set to take part in three prominent Nordic events in the initial week of May 2026. The Oslo Tech Show will see them as a Gold Partner, while they will have two keynote sessions at V2 Security Copenhagen and participate in the Solution Summit in Denmark. This opportunity will allow the Zero Trust Platform provider to engage with a significant audience comprising thousands of attendees.

data.title: Zatitude Luxury Apartments Named to 2025 ORA® Elite 1% Power Ranking as Only Fort Walton Beach Community Recognized
data.description: Luxury apartments in Fort Walton Beach, Zatitude, have been recognized for their exceptional resident satisfaction by achieving a Top 1% ORA® Elite ranking, out of over 150,000 communities. The achievement was announced on April 23, 2026, in Fort Walton Beach, Florida. Zatitude is the only living community to receive such a prestigious 2025 ORA® Elite 1% Power Ranking.”

data.title: DesignO Launches Advanced B2B Web-to-Print Solution for Corporate Printers and Franchise Businesses
data.description: DesignNBuy has introduced a new B2B corporate portal and franchise management module in DesignO 2.6, providing enterprise print businesses and multi-location brands with efficient tools to cater to organized clients and oversee dispersed operations all within a single platform. The development was unveiled in AHMEDABAD, India on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Quantumtronix Advances Precision Nutrition With Patent-Pending 'Multi-Target Cellular Delivery Network' as Carno Lux Sells Out in Record 60 Days
data.description: Utilizing a unique bio-electrical mineral matrix and an innovative 5-component synergistic system, Carno Lux effectively addresses biological obstacles to facilitate targeted nutrient delivery to the intracellular space. The breakthrough technology is developed by Quantumtronix Inc., based in Markham, ON. The advancements were unveiled on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Med Tech Solutions Appoints Dan Stoke as Chief Growth Officer and Matt Trevorrow as Chief Information Officer
data.description: In Valencia, California, on April 23, 2026, Med Tech Solutions (MTS) hired Arm to enhance their services in the healthcare continuum. Dan Stoke was named Chief Growth Officer (CGO) while Matt assumed a key role in the company's expansion.

data.title: Reimagining Local Economy: YMPJ Launching Soundview Economic Hub in the Bronx to Boost Community and Mission Impact
data.description: A recent event at Inspiration Point in the Bronx saw Youth Ministries for Peace and Justice (YMPJ) hosting a Fast Pitch event. The event brought together funders, partners, and business leaders to showcase plans for the activation of the new Soundview Economic Hub. This community-driven initiative aims to expand opportunities and support economic growth in the area.
